title: Mermaid Diagram Server - MCP Server Setup
purpose: This document outlines the setup and configuration of the Mermaid Diagram Server's MCP (Model Communication Protocol) server, which provides a range of tools for managing diagrams, documents, designs, and sessions within a collaborative environment.
module_context: The server is initialized with a specific name and version, and it sets up handlers for various requests including listing tools, resources, and handling tool invocations. It also initializes a pseudo-database for faster startup and handles session management.

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo-db v6 handle for the current working directory at startup to begin warming/scanning immediately instead of lazily on first tool call.
Check for and consume the SessionStart rescan marker if present, unlinking it and triggering a retry scan if found.
Create a new Server instance with the name 'mermaid-diagram-server' and version SERVER_VERSION.
Set up handlers for ListResourcesRequestSchema and ReadResourceRequestSchema.
Set up a handler for ListToolsRequestSchema that returns a list of available tools with their descriptions and input schemas.
Set up handlers for various tool invocations including diagram management, document management, design management, session management, and more.
